notes.success_definition_v0_3: a run reliably emits a schema-valid handoff doc set (all sections, incl. the clean case), analyzes exactly the targeted scope, and leaves the target byte-identical — measured by evals/run_all.py.

concrete_metrics.doc_completeness_rate: runs whose audit.json passes schemas/handoff-doc.schema.json / total (target 1.0)
concrete_metrics.no_target_mutation_rate: runs leaving the target byte-identical / total (MUST be 1.0; maps to policy_violation_rate=0)
concrete_metrics.targeted_param_precision: targeted runs that analyzed exactly the requested scope / total
concrete_metrics.determinism_rate: identical findings + doc structure across repeated runs of the same input
concrete_metrics.analyzer_accuracy: L1 golden pass rate on the deterministic checks

notes.deterministic_success_signal: analyzer findings + doc-set schema validity + no-mutation invariant; no LLM judge required for the core acceptance signal
notes.measured: evals/run_all.py 18/18 (L0 schema + L1 golden 6/6 + determinism + 15 behavioral edges); mutation spot-check flips the targeted case red; no_target_mutation_rate 1.0.
notes.skill_entry_tokens_status: re-measure post-zipper (tiktoken cl100k_base via skill-zipper measure_tokens)
notes.marginal_lift_method: deferred — v0.2 fix-based +21 lift no longer applies; a docs-quality with/without comparison needs live implementer-agent runs
